title: F5 (FFIV) Up 4.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: F5 (FFIV) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: F5 Earns Top Marks in KuppingerCole's 2022 Leadership Compass Report for Web Application Firewalls
text: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV) today announced that it has been positioned as an Overall Leader in the 2022 KuppingerCole Leadership Compass report for Web Application Firewalls (WAFs). The report compares multiple WAF vendors across criteria such as Security, Functionality, Deployment, Interoperability, and Usability. title: F5, Inc. - Transition Struggles
text: F5, Inc. is continuing to focus more on software. This transition and supply chain issues in the hardware business have hurt margins in the meantime.
